zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Holme of Paull Holme於1344年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾霍爾梅時，他的父親Sir Bryan Holme of Paull Holme26歲，母親Dame Helen of Châtillon-Blois21歲。他於1375年與Julian Rockley在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1380年在英國越可爾約克享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾約克霍利 特利尼迪 金也斯 斯華雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Holme of Paull Holme于1344年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾霍爾梅时，他的父亲Sir Bryan Holme of Paull Holme26岁，母亲Dame Helen of Châtillon-Blois21岁。他于1375年与Julian Rockley在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1380年在英国越可爾約克享年36岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾約克霍利 特利尼迪 金也斯 斯華雷。

nameMeanings.name: Holme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern England): variant of   Holm   and of   Home   3 and 4.
Danish and Swedish: variant of   Holm   1.

variants.name: Holm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Anders, Thor, Holger, Nels, Nils, Sven, Helmer, Lennart, Niels, Vibeke.

English, Scottish, German, and Scandinavian: topographic name for someone who lived on an island, in particular a piece of slightly raised land lying in a fen or partly surrounded by streams, from Middle English, Middle Low German holm, Old Norse holmr, or else a habitational name from a place called with this element. The Swedish name is often ornamental.

English: topographic name for someone who lived where holly grew, from Middle English holm, a divergent development of Old English hole(g)n ‘holly (tree)’; or, especially in southern England, a habitational name from any of the places such as East and West Holme (Dorset) or Holne (Devon). Compare Hollis .

variants.name: Holmes
meanings: English: either from the plural form of Holme , or else a variant of Holme or Home , with excrescent -s (see Holm ).

Scottish: probably a habitational name from Holmes near Dundonald (Ayrshire), or possibly from another place so called in the barony of Inchestuir (Angus). Both placenames likely derive from the plural form of Middle English, Older Scots holm ‘islet, raised land in a marsh’ (see Holm ).

Scottish and Irish: adopted for Scottish Gaelic and Irish Mac Thómais, Mac Thómais (see McComb ). In parts of western Ireland, Holmes is also a variant of Cavish, from Gaelic Mac Thámhais, another patronymic from Thomas . Early bearers in Ireland were probably immigrants from Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Holme of Paull Holme was born in 1344, in Holme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Bryan Holme of Paull Holme, was 26 and his mother, Dame Helen of Châtillon-Blois, was 21. He married Julian Rockley in 1375, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1380, in York, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in Holy Trinity King's Square, York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Holme of Paull Holme est né en 1344, à Holme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Bryan Holme of Paull Holme, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Dame Helen of Châtillon-Blois, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Julian Rockley en 1375, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1380, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Holy Trinity King's Square, York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1375 in Yorkshire, England Julian Rockley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1380 im Alter von 36 Jahren in York, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Holy Trinity King's Square, York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.Holy Trinity King's Square, York, Yorksh: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크 홀이 트리니티 킨그'스 스퀄르
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Holme of Paull Holme(이)가 1344년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Bryan Holme of Paull Holme(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Dame Helen of Châtillon-Blois(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1375년 영국 요르크실르에서 Julian Rockley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1380년 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크 홀이 트리니티 킨그'스 스퀄르에 묻혔다.

ru.Holy Trinity King's Square, York, Yorksh: холи тринити кинг'с скуар, ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Holme of Paull Holme родился в 1344 г. в местности холм, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Bryan Holme of Paull Holme было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame Helen of Châtillon-Blois, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Julian Rockley в 1375 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1380 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности холи тринити кинг'с скуар, ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
